message:
test(config): add TOML config parse and validation tests (ft-1memj.31)

Add comprehensive TOML config test coverage:
- full_config_loads_all_fields: fully populated frankenterm.toml roundtrip
- type_mismatch_produces_error: wrong type (string for int) gives error
- default_values_for_unpopulated_keys: verify defaults for scrollback,
  font_size, initial_rows/cols
- window_padding_config_loads: nested [window_padding] table parses

Existing tests already cover: empty config, basic fields, search paths,
nonexistent file, malformed TOML, env var override, case-insensitive
extension, override precedence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
